text: I noticed you started this session with I Communicate Now. You usually use We Communicate Now. Is there uh any significance or difference with respect to that? And is there anything that we can do to make the instrument more comfortable or improve the contact? I am Ra. We am Ra. You may see the grammatical difficulties of your linguistic structure in dealing with a social memory complex. There is no distinction between a first, a person, a singular, and a plural in a Yor, a language, a win a pertaining to Ra. We offer the following not to infringe upon your free will, but because this instrument has specifically requested information as a tool, it's a maintenance and a the support, a group, a das, a soul at this a querying. We may suggest that the instrument has two areas of potential distortion, both of which may be aided in the bodily sense by the ingestion of those things which seem to the instrument a to a be a desirable. We do not suggest any hard and fast rulings of a diet, although we may suggest the virtue of the liquids. It is a being aided by affirmations and also by the light which is the food of the density of resting. We may ask the sofort, a group to monitor the instrument as always, a soul that in thee, a case of thee, a desire for the more complex proteins, that which is the least distorted a mind be offered to the bodily complex, which is indeed at this time potentially capable of greatly increased distortion. I am Rah. We thank you, my friends, for your continued conscientiousness in the fulfilling of your manifestation of desire to serve others. You are conscientious. The pertinences are quite well aligned. I am I leave you, my friends, in the love and in the light of the one infinite creator. Go forth therefore, rejoicing merely in the power and in the peace of the one infinite creator.
